text: In any surgical procedure, there are basic steps. In laparoscopic right colectomy, there are also very basic steps.
The surgeon mobilizes the colon during a laparoscopic right colectomy, preparing it for the resection of the right colon.
The steps of a laparoscopic right colectomy appear on the slide.
In a prior video, part one, we looked at steps two, three, four, and five. In this video, we look at step six, which is mobilization of the terminal ilium to the hepatic flexure.
There are other videos on this channel showing basic steps of laparoscopic colectomies and other procedures. Stay tuned for more videos.
